docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-13-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAO CHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHING-LIN WANG IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S FILED PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-ATTEMPT PROPER SERVICE ON DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HAO CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHING-LIN WANG IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2023 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-13-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAO CHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHING-LIN WANG IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS PROOF OF SERVICE WHICH HAS NOT BEEN FILED. CASE CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF INSTRUCTED TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE BEFORE THE NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
